programme.desc: Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's class is taking a field trips to visit parents at their jobs. Francine's not sure she wants the class to know her dad is a garbage man. And a new carpet and a sneezing attack means Muffy must spend the weekend at Francine's.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Pet Business/D.W. The Copycat
programme.desc: How can Arthur prove to his parents that he's responsible enough to take care of his very own puppy? "Get a job," suggests D.W.!. Yet another personality change for D.W., who's decided that from now on, she'll be just like Arthur.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Gift Of The Dinos - Winter
programme.desc: It's Christmas and BJ dreams of getting a new baseball glove to go with his baseball, while Riff hopes for new drumsticks to use his drum. Barney reminds them that Christmas is more than just getting gifts and helps them learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 2
programme.desc: Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: History Lessons
programme.desc: Bumblebee's guided tour of Earth brings the Bee Team to Optimus Prime's old base, but Sideswipe doesn't have any use for history.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Strongarm's Big Score
programme.desc: When Strongarm surprisingly scores the lowest on a skills test created by Fixit, she's determined to improve her score.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Not wanting the overaggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a “solo mission” to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mighty Big Trouble
programme.desc: The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mini–Con Madness
programme.desc: Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Worthy
programme.desc: Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 1
programme.desc: Bumblebee, still relaxing after the Autobots' triumph over Starscream, feels his team can tackle any issue that might come up.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 2
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heat seeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Defrosted
programme.desc: Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant “teacher” Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Blurred
programme.desc: While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.desc: Germany beats Sweden with a golden goal to claim their first Women's World Cup title.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandy & Patrick
programme.desc: Leaving everything behind in Wisconsin, Sandy and Pat recently relocated to Nashville for his new dream job.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Carolyn & Brad
programme.desc: After supporting grandma through a tough time, a young family searches for a home of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Ryan & Julie

programme.title: Property Brothers: Aben & Ashley
programme.desc: A musical couple is eager to find their forever home near Nashville’s legendary Music Row.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Shauna & Steve
programme.desc: After their house sold quickly, a family is on the hunt for a mountain-chic home. They are determined to stay in the same neighborhood, but Drew warns they'll have to widen their search if they want to get everything.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Robin & Louise

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi, Come Home
programme.desc: Shredder has a hare-brained scheme to turn the rabbit from another dimension, Usagi Yojimbo, into an ally of his and an enemy of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches Laa-Laa to count to six. The Teletubbies watch some children sing and act out the nursery rhyme ‘Sing a Song of Sixpence’.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies slide in to Home Hill and run off to see a parade celebrating the Chinese New Year. A little boy shows us the dragons. A tooter appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky blows it very hard it knocks Dipsy's hat off.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky sees Dipsy on top of the House. The Teletubbies watch some children playing a on top and underneath game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The toaster makes an extra piece of Tubby Toast – but who is going to eat it? The Teletubbies watch Emily And Jamie take their dog Jessie for a walk before giving her a bath.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to play slide games. They stop when it is time to watch some children go on a train journey. Po loves to ride her scooter, but one day it rolls away and Po chases it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to dance, but everything stops when the Teletubbies watch some children learn about balancing. The Teletubbies take it in turns to stand on one leg. The animals are on the march through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po’s present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things, so Tinky Winky goes for a walk on his own – all the way home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and Dizzy have spent the night at Bob’s old yard in Bobsville to help Wendy with some digging and mixing. The machines all wish that Wendy could come and live out in Sunflower Valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is replacing a potting shed on Mr Beasley’s allotment. In the old shed is a chest which Mr Beasley doesn’t need any more. Meanwhile Wendy calls at JJ’s for the materials for the new shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a Seaweed Farm for Annie Pickles – Farmer Pickles cousin. Scrambler volunteers to help Annie collect seaweed seedling on the beach.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has decided to open a camp site on his land, and Bob is installing a shower block and fence to keep the sheep out. For once, he is working on his own while Wendy goes on holiday with Jenny.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s the team’s first full day in Sunflower Valley and the machines are all a bit nervous of the mammoth job ahead. All except for Muck who is determined to show that he’s not a bit worried. Travis arrives with Bob’s new mobile home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An observation tower is going to be added next to the Visitor’s centre to provide a scenic view of Sunflower Valley. The scaffolding is raised and Roley prepares a path to connect the tower to the Dome.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s Mr and Mrs Bentley’s twenty fifth wedding anniversary and to celebrate Mr Bentley asks Bob and the gang to build a special summer house. Mrs Bentley is out for the day and the summer house is to be a surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An early morning start for the sunflower valley team, as they are moving logs in preparation for a safety fence around Mr Sabatini’s windmill. Wendy’s off to the sunflower oil factory to help Marjorie with a big delivery.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor. He asks Muck to collect some special tiles from JJ, explaining that they are very fragile and easy to break.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are drilling a special well at their homestead. The well has its own water tank, which needs to be raised from the ground on rocks. Wendy and Scrambler arrive for the first ever time in Sunflower Valley..

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is playing with the Sunflower Valley children; Sunny, Saffron, Carlo and Cassia in the playground. It’s the last day before they have to go back to school in Bobsville and they are all sad to be leaving.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr. Beasley decides to grow pineapples, and the best way top do this is to build a pineapple pit – a special pit, heated by horse manure! Travis wants to help and decides to fetch some horse manure from Farmer Pickles farm in Bobsville as quick as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is repairing a leaking water tank at the school, when he discovers bats in the belfry. He tapes up the tank temporarily, but says the bats will need a new home as they are a protected species.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s just finished tidying his mobile home when Farmer Pickles comes and asks if he’ll help with his Sunflower Harvest. He needs a silo built in which to store the ripe sunflowers before they’re taken to the factory.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s renovating a dilapidated old watermill in Sunflower Valley – it’s going to make flour from Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. After checking that it’s safe, Bob realises that one of the millstones has gone missing. How very odd!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob, Scoop and Skip are helping Mr Beasley to install a new Rockery when Mr Bentley appears to ask for Bob’s help. The Mayor wants to stage an art exhibition, but there are no available venues. Scoop suggests renovating the inside of the Old Mill.

programme.desc: Chris Murphy and Henry Deacon discuss Max Hopp's trailblazing darts career.

programme.title: The Greatest Darts Matches Ever
programme.desc: Paul Hinks and Keegan Brown join Chris Murphy to discuss the greatest darts matches of all time!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk: The Story of Richie Burnett
programme.desc: Richie Burnett joins Paul Nicholson on Tungsten Talk to delve into memorable moments on the darts circuit.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Steve Beaton and Mervyn King
programme.desc: Glen Durrant analyses the throws of darts legends Steve Beaton and Mervyn King.

programme.title: The Story of Fallon Sherrock
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Glen Durrant discuss the story of Fallon Sherrock's trailblazing rise in darts.

programme.title: On the Oche
programme.desc: Ashley Coleman joins Jake Kenyon for a chuck and a chat.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Southern Disappearance, Playboy Con Man & UD, UD: Florida Crime Spree, College Student Murders & UD and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Born to Kill, Carnies, Children's Past Lives, Update: I.D. Swap, Sadd Fugitive and Nine Lives.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Roswell (Pts. 1 &2), Dottie Caylor, Marine Captain Murder, Medford's Millions update and Packer Church Fire.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive Squirrel, Waag the Dog, Mystery Mummy, Vigilante, Who Plugged Bugsy? and Murder in Connecticut.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Iceman, Orphanage Friends & UD, CIA Cover-Up and UD: Larry's Rampage.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Unfinished business
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted..? team are back with the first episode kicking of a brand new season. Three more venues are put before the team, only one will be investigated: but which one?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: A different time
programme.desc: In this episode, the AYH team visit a building that delivers much more than initially meets the eye. Poltergeist activity, unexplained noises and vocal sounds are all experienced...but at which venue?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something behind me!
programme.desc: The team are back once again. This episode sees the intrepid team joined by two guest investigators - Kevin Ling and Michael Roberts - as they investigate a reputedly haunted venue bigger than most!

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who's down there?
programme.desc: The team investigate a sprawling venue where apparitions, noises, and an unsavoury entity have been reported. Sara has an experience she won't forget. Dale gets a headache. And the entire team is mystified by a particular incident that keeps occurring.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Somebody walking there!
programme.desc: In this episode of the paranormal investigation series, the AYH team investigate a venue that has an intriguing history. Phil and Dale get a fright; Sara has a thought-provoking, emotional moment; and Jane becomes rather tongue-tied over it all.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 3
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 4
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 5
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 6
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: Ever since Wes and his family moved into their new home in York, PA they've been struggling with a dark force that's made everyday a living hell. Wes feels his mental and physical health is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 of this terrifying place concentrates above ground. The team are alarmed at the results from a new piece of equipment and Yvette meets her match.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Fort Paull Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The Most Haunted team explore the underground of Fort Paull. With its foundations and footprint dating back 100’s of years the team are faced with some terrifying ordeals.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Annison Funeral Parlour
programme.desc: Coffins, murder and a malevolent spirit plague the team as they investigate this one-time funeral home. With one member isolated alone another in a coffin the team catch a poltergeist in action

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Mystery of Douglas Hibbard, Wheelchair Man, The Vigil, The Mandarin's Bowl, Ghost Writer.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Handyman, Anatole, Makeup Magic, Screwdriver, Charlie.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Cup of Joe, Secret of the Family Tomb, Wheezer, The Unknown Patient.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Apparition, The Electric Chair, On the Road, Number One with a Bullet, Dream House.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: On the Case: A Heartbreaking Discovery
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears police painstakingly retrace her last known movements. The trail of clues they uncover leads to a shocking and heartbreaking discovery.

programme.title: On the Case: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A young woman travels to California in pursuit of a Hollywood dream and winds up the victim of a savage homicide.

programme.title: On the Case: Sirens in the Night
programme.desc: Paula takes a look at the shocking discovery of a mysterious young woman who is found in the ashes of a fire.

programme.title: On the Case: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home. Was the killer also a guest at the celebration?

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Obsession
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered out in the New Mexico wilderness, police must unravel her killer's twisted obsession in order to solve the crime.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: On an Earth nearly depleted of natural resources, a group of people discovers an evil use for the secret of sliding. With John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) could pose an additional threat to a world where dangerous tornadoes have forced the population into safety zones. With guest star Corey Feldman.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn (Jerry O'Connell) meets and plays bodyguard to his younger self (guest star Phillip Van Dyke) when the Sliders land on a world like their own where time moves slower.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on a world where a powerful group can invade a person's dreams. With John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: In a chaotic world suffering from a scarcity of water, the Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) search for a hidden treasure.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder On The Gulf Coast
programme.desc: When the body of former policewoman Taylor Wright was discovered buried on a remote Pensacola farm, detectives had a lineup of suspects to investigate, including her ex-husband from whom Taylor stole $100,000, and her new live-in girlfriend Casandra.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard
programme.desc: A hog farmer claims his wife fell on a four-pronged rake and died - but there is a hole in his story and his wife's body holds the clue.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Kentucky Hills
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers called 911 to report that she had killed her boyfriend in self-defense after he attacked her. But investigators soon learned he was planning a date with another woman, and alleged Shayna killed him in a jealous rage.

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha: Fired Up
programme.desc: Eager to get on the fast track at Vibe Magazine, Moesha pretends to be a reporter to land a Maya Angelou interview. But her ambition, coupled with Maya’s advice, leads Moesha down an entirely different path than she’d planned.

programme.title: Moesha: The Party’s Over (Here)
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Moesha: Mis-Directed Study
programme.desc: Moesha is flying high after she gets a job tutoring one of the basketball team’s star players until she finds out what kind of game he really wants to play.

programme.title: Moesha: Not My Pumpkin
programme.desc: Things get tense at the Mitchell house when Frank discovers Moesha has been taking birth control pills – and he’s the last to know.

programme.title: Moesha: Just Above My Head
programme.desc: Moesha finds her history teacher’s remarks racially offensive, but fears that confronting him might affect her grade and cost Niecy her scholarship.

programme.title: Moesha: A Den Is A Terrible Thing To Waste
programme.desc: A well-intentioned Moesha intervenes to try and stop her once-popular hangout, The Den, from being sold to a commercial developer, unaware that Andell stands to make a great deal of money on its sale.

programme.title: Moesha: Isn’t She Lovely?
programme.desc: Hakeem and Moesha’s friendship takes an interesting turn after he surprises her with an expensive necklace to wear to a homecoming dance she’s attending with someone else.

programme.title: Moesha: Unappreciated Interest
programme.desc: Dorian pulls an illegal scam involving Frank’s credit card and makes matters worse by lying about it, behavior that could have dramatic consequences.

programme.title: Moesha: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With Dee sick in bed with a bad cold, Moesha offers to prepare the Thanksgiving feast but finds herself engaged in a fierce cooking competition with Hakeem’s mother.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Second Black President Episode
programme.desc: Kevin tries to run for seventh-grade class president, but he is torn about how to run his campaign.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Green Episode
programme.desc: The family tries become environmental friendly with each other but chaos ensures

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Father's Day Episode
programme.desc: Frank is an uninvited guest on Nick's Father's Day trip, but the two bond during an elevator stoppage.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The My First Job Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey gets her first job at a fast food restaurant, but soon gets fired when she gives out free food.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Tiger Dad Episode
programme.desc: Nick tries to become a more effective parent, so he pushes Kevin and Lindsey to become better people.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Expensive Purse Episode
programme.desc: Against Nick's wishes, Suzanne buys an expensive purse and Nick becomes suspicious about it, so he uses her guilt to his advantage.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Master of Ceremonies Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne becomes the subject to Nick's joke-off, and Suzanne retaliates against him.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Control Issue Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Ghost Dog Episode
programme.desc: Nick, Suzanne, and Kevin pull pranks on each other, but their addiction leads to a near-death experience.

programme.title: NEW Burning Love: A Shocking Twist - Pop Culture Contest
programme.desc: Jealousy causes one contestant to go too far. And Mark makes a tough decision. The contestants compete in a Pop Culture Contest.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Raphael Lomoro Case
programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: The Things Men Do

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.desc: Shawn and Gus are hired by a childhood friend to find missing camp counselor Annie, who disappeared near their old sleep away campgrounds.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: The Yin Yang Killer, a serial killer who was active when Henry was a cop then went silent, is back and wants to toy with the department again, this time singling out Shawn as his primary playmate.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Bliss
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called "bliss" via a Taelon device. They discover it is widespread. With an instantly strong addictive property, the addicts are dying within 48 hours. The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Highjacked
programme.desc: With a reporter on board, the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space. Liam is the prime suspect, causing an even bigger rift between Da'an and Zo'or. As the ship floats, lost in space, they must find the real culprit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Defector
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle. When Liam locates the survivor (a Taelon called Belleye), he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Heroes and Heartbreak
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project, but the others are worried about his involvement. When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet, the Earth is in danger.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of D.C. Liam recovers the probe, but he, Augur, and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Crossfire
programme.desc: As the election draws near, Liam believes Zo'or is trying to have Jonathan Doors murdered. The Resistance worries that an attack is imminent at the final debate. Julia mobilizes a group to protect Doors against Liam's wishes.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: With proof that prehistoric creatures may still be living, a group led by Professor George Challenger is assembled to go on an expedition to uncover more.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stranded
programme.desc: The group saves Chief Jacoba's daughter Assai from the Ape men earning them safe passage home through his caves. But Marguerite's greed causes the cave to collapse on itself.

programme.title: The Lost World: More Than Human
programme.desc: The adventurers are captured by a reptilian race in a land where humans are at the bottom of the hierarchy. They come across other enslaved humans and rally them to help fight back.

programme.title: The Lost World: Nectar
programme.desc: To retrieve an antidote that will save professor Summerlee from deadly venom, the explorers must venture into a bee hive that no human has ever made it out of alive.

programme.title: The Lost World: Cave of Fear
programme.desc: Professor Challenger is taken hostage. To save him, the group, goes into the cave of fear to retrieve bones for a ritual offering. In the process, they revisit the dark corners of their past.

programme.title: The Lost World: Salvation
programme.desc: Summerlee saves an unconscious child from a river with CPR, which convinces the village leader they are witches. They will be burned on the stake unless they can influence the council otherwise.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E6 - Natural Election
programme.desc: Crichton correctly predicts a wormhole's appearance near Moya, but simultaneously a giant space plant captures the Leviathan.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E7 - John Quixote
programme.desc: Crichton and Chiana get stuck in a video game where they encounter strange/twisted versions of their friends.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E8 - I Shrink Therefore I Am
programme.desc: When Moya is raided by bounty hunters working for the Peacekeepers, every crew member is captured except for Crichton and Noranti.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E9 - A Prefect Murder
programme.desc: While Moya and her crew are resupplying on a generally xenophobic planet, Aeryn kills the next prefect while under a strange form of suggestion.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E10 - Coup By Clam
programme.desc: The crew consume food, sharing amongst themselves. Although if not ingested by the same person, it becomes toxic.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E11 - Unrealized Reality
programme.desc: Crichton falls into a wormhole and meets up with a strange man who shows Crichton the consequences of wormhole travel.

programme.title: Mythbusters Pirate Special
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person jab a knife in a boat's sail, ride down the sail and land safely on the deck? Does an eyepatch help someone see in the dark?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 153
programme.desc: Can a person be launched 115 feet into a kiddie pool from a giant waterslide? Can a mail delivery truck taking only right turns save gas?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 159
programme.desc: When you get "cold feet," do your feet actually get colder? When the poop hits the fan, does everyone get covered in the ensuing chaos?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 131
programme.desc: Can a sonic shock wave shatter glass? Is it possible to bend bullets around obstacles, like in the movie "Wanted?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 31
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a toy car beat a Dodge Viper in a quarter-mile downhill race? Is yawning contagious? Does buttered toast always land buttered-side down?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: We Can't Live Like This
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: While on holiday, the detectives are impersonated for a profit.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A cowgirl from a visiting rodeo show asks Sherlock Holmes to help her when she discovers a dead man in her hotel room.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman mistakenly has her ball switched for a real croquet ball that kills a Parliament member.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Brian O'Casey explains his story of the sweepstakes ticket, and the urgency to find the lost ticket.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A French interpreter urgently needs the detective, as criminals try to take him to their hide out.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to the Sussex countryside to 'fish' for clues in a shotgun murder.

programme.title: The Spider Woman
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes investigates a series of so-called \\"pajama suicides\\". He knows the female villain behind them is as cunning as Moriarty and as venomous as a spider.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Impromptu Performance
programme.desc: A condemned man scheduled to hang the next day uses his last request to ask Sherlock Holmes to prove his innocence of the murder for which he is about to be executed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death

programme.title: The New Detectives: Hidden Obsessions
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must identify the type of protein used in five dishes; as the winning team enjoys its victory at a beach house, the losing team must grind and mill grains to make bread from scratch; contestants are grilled during elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay makes a decision that changes the competition; two chefs work as servers during the dinner service; each team nominates two contestants to be put up for elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Martin Yan judges six Chinese dishes created by the remaining contestants; during dinner service, one team disappoints a VIP guest; a contestant is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants enter an animal pen to determine which type of protein they will cook in the team challenge; during dinner service, the contestants must impress chef Ramsay's family.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must create five steak dishes; a diner finds an unpleasant surprise in her dish during dinner service; the elimination round brings out bad tempers.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Vegas or Bust

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up

programme.title: Operation Repo starts 9pm

programme.title: Operation Repo starts 9pm

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You

programme.desc: Cash-strapped college students Nikki and Kim Parker become a mother-daughter telephone psychic team.

programme.desc: Young nurse sues ex-boyfriend for damages, Dodge Durango payments, motorcycle damages, and unpaid cell phone charges/Woman sues evicted friend and child for back rent, countersued for belongings left behind.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.131
programme.desc: Man sued by parents after second wife's mysterious death and $40,000 life insurance policy; alleged child abuse involved/Man calls cops to remove ex-girlfriend from apartment, sues her for rent after she leaves, fearing for his life.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.30
programme.desc: Man returns to estranged wife after girlfriend allegedly hires divorce attorney/Man sues cousin for damaging and disposing of property post-eviction from shared home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.177

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.13
programme.desc: A woman claims her ex-boyfriend asked her to pawn her jewelry to pay their bills; he says she offered to do it/A loan to pay DUI bills is disputed by ex-lovers, one of whom claims it was a birthday gift.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.18
programme.desc: Teenagers steal car, vandalize junkyard; one pleads guilty, demands co-conspirator pay $15,000 fine/Woman sues ex for loan balance; he countersues for harassment/Woman seeks compensation for testifying against son's ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Negotiators

programme.title: 48 Hours: Eleven Hundred Miles to Murder
programme.desc: Authorities first suspect the husband in the savage murder of a Florida doctor, but when he has an alibi, they follow a tip on a 1,100 mile trip that takes the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Bitter Pill
programme.desc: Stella Nickell of Auburn, Washington, was sentenced to 90 year in federal prison for poisoning her husband Bruce and Sue Snow, a Seattle bank manager with cyanide-laced Excedrin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: My Father's Killer

programme.title: 48 Hours: Prisoners in Paradise
programme.desc: When Lois McMillen, a Connecticut artist was found dead on the British Virgin Island of Tortola in January 2000, four young American tourists were charged with her brutal murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn’t come home from work and the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NEW The Dating Game Killer: Smooth Talker (Part 1)
programme.desc: With a string of murders already behind him, Rodney Alcala is chosen to appear on the game show, “The Dating Game.” What happens next makes him one of the most horrific killers in US history.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: The Strathfield massacre in Sydney in August 1991 will be remembered as one of Australia's most shocking gun crimes. Wade Frankum entered a shopping mall one afternoon, he stabbed a teenage girl before opening fire on unsuspecting shoppers.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: Five-year-old Darcey Freeman suffered a horrific death at the hands of her father in January 2009. Driving her to her first day at school, he stopped on the Westgate Bridge and callously threw her off the side, in full view of her two older brothers.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
programme.desc: The story behind one of Australia's most high-profile terrorist attacks, the Russell Police Headquarters bombing which killed the first Australian policewoman in the line of duty.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A young UK student is raped and murdered. Surveillance footage traps a serial sex offender. A jazz musician and his new girlfriend are murdered a week apart by her jealous ex.

programme.title: Killers: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Pregnant Summer Tatum was shot twice in the head by her husband after she discovered his online affair. Andreen McDonald, a businesswoman, was killed by her husband, Andre, with a hammer.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Australian Alps

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: There's A New Mork In Town
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork Meets Robin Williams
